nodes.label: Product Vision: Financial Outcome Engine for Creators
Core Principles (Outcome > Activity, Automation > Input, Clarity > Power)
System Modules: Deal, Payment, Deliverable, Notification, Intelligence
Data Flow: Input → Validate → Normalize → Process → Output
Phase 2: Workflow Automation (BullMQ, email reminders, multi-user)
Release Gates (CI, migrations, browser validation, secrets, instrumentation)
Tech Stack: TypeScript, Next.js 16, React 19, Framer Motion, Fastify, PostgreSQL, Redis, Serwist
PWA Rules: Serwist, Service Worker, No Cached Financial State
Motion System: Framer Motion, useReducedMotion(), GPU-composited animations
Accessibility: WCAG 2.2 AA, Keyboard Operable Revenue Paths
Performance Budgets: Core Web Vitals, LCP, INP, CLS
Context Optimization: code-review-graph MCP, No Full-Repo Reads
Multi-Agent System: Planner, Researcher, Developer, Tester, Reviewer, Optimizer
Decision Priority: User Outcome > Determinism > Simplicity > Dev Velocity > Extensibility
Build vs Reject: Revenue/Risk + Automation + Simplest Viable System
Kill Criteria: No Revenue Impact in 2 Iterations, Cognitive Load, Non-Determinism
Security: Secrets in Env Only, Auth Boundaries, Minimum Data Collection
Anti-Patterns (Zero Tolerance): No Build Without Research, No Black-Box AI, Silent Failures
PWA Push Notifications: Opt-in, Specific Copy, ≤3/day, Web Push API
Outcome Validation & Instrumentation: Named Events, Baseline, Staged Rollout
PWA Setup: Serwist, next dev -p 3000, boneyard-js skeletons
Dev Setup: pnpm, API_URL rewrite, session cookie, port 3000/3001
AGENTS.md: AI Agent Development Rules v1.3.0
Agents Context Optimization: code-review-graph MCP First
Agent Roles: Planner, Researcher, Developer, Tester, Reviewer, Optimizer
Release 0.3.2: PWA Install Prompt + Offline Banner
Release 0.2.1: Payment Reminder Copy + brandName on Overdue Actions
Release 0.1.7: Payment Invoice HTML + View Invoice Link
Release 0.1.6: Home Overview Unavailable A11y + GitHub Actions CI/CD
Docs README: Architecture, UX, Decisions, Releases Index
Infra README: GitHub Actions CI/CD Workflows, PostgreSQL Setup
Deal Lifecycle: DRAFT → NEGOTIATING → ACTIVE → DELIVERED → PAID (or CANCELLED)
Brand Directory: /deals/brands with contracted totals per currency
Invoice Numbering: Sequential INV-######## with invoice_counters table
Shareable Deal Proposal: Public /p/[token] page, 64-char token
CSV Exports: Deals, Payments, Deliverables, Attention Queue
Deal Duplication: Clone deal as DRAFT, clear dates and shareToken
Auth & Tenancy: HTTP-only session cookie, Deal.userId, RBAC
Deal Pipeline Stage Strip: Status filter tabs with per-status counts
Payment Reminder Copy: buildPaymentReminderMessage, one-tap clipboard
PWA Offline: Install Prompt, Offline Banner, useSyncExternalStore
User Registration: POST /auth/register, bcrypt, MEMBER role, auto-session
code-review-graph MCP: Mandatory Before Bulk File Reads
Research First: No Research → No Development Hard Rule
Explainable AI: No Black-Box, Always Cite Data, Human-in-the-Loop for Money

Rationale: No Confirmation Dialog for Close Deal

Rationale: pnpm workspaces without Turborepo for <10 packages
Rationale: Zod validation at both API and form boundaries
Rationale: Status FSM enforced server-side in @oompa/types
Rationale: Serwist over hand-rolled Workbox for PWA
Rationale: Clipboard first over email jobs for reminders
Rationale: Invoice number assigned on first open, not payment creation
Rationale: Duplicated deal always starts as DRAFT
Rationale: Single source of truth for overdue in priority-actions.ts
Rationale: computeDealNextAction placed in @oompa/types not web
Rationale: Deal-rows-only CSV export for v1 (fastest path)

Decision: No Production CORS Change in 0.1.8

Decision: 10k Payment Cap vs 5k Deals Cap for CSV Export

Decision: Silent Failure for Brand Suggestions (offline/degraded API)

Decision: Keep /health Legacy Route for Backward Compatibility

Decision: Reuse Root title.template for Deals Page Titles
Decision: Centralize Query Parsing in lib/ (testable without RSC harness)
